title: Bead Beating in Custom Buffer Followed by XP Bead Cleanup
author: Jason D Limberis
materials: rpm, °C, Centrifuge at max speed for 00:10:00

steps.title: %s %s ComponentAmount to addNaCl (5M)2 mLTris-HCl pH 8
steps.instruction: %s %s ComponentAmount to addNaCl (5M)2 mLTris-HCl pH 8.3 (1M)1 mLEDTA pH 9.0 (0.5M)0.2 mLTriton X-1001 mLH2O95.8 mL %s %s ComponentAmount for 100 mLTris-HCl 1M pH 81 mLEDTA 0.5M20 uL

steps.title: If required (i
steps.instruction: If required (i.e., to remove samples for processing outside a BSL-3), decontaminate MGIT culture in the original tube and media for 01:00:00 at 80 °C according to the standard operating procedures of the South African National Health Laboratory Services (NHLS) facility or your facilities guidelines.

steps.title: Resuspend in 350 µL of Custom Triton Buffer
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 350 µL of Custom Triton Buffer

steps.title: Place on the magnetic rack, wait...
steps.instruction: Place on the magnetic rack, wait for the solution to become clear ~ 00:00:30 , and transfer the eluted DNA to a new well-labeled tube

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 00:02:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 00:02:00

steps.title: Immediately after the bead pellet becomes...
steps.instruction: Immediately after the bead pellet becomes opaque, remove the tube from the magnetic rack and resuspend in 20 µL of Low EDTA Tris Buffer . Ensure all beads are in solution.

steps.title: Dry the beads briefly, ~ 00:01:00
steps.instruction: Dry the beads briefly, ~ 00:01:00 . Tip: Remove residual EtOH with a p10 pipette

steps.title: Place on magnetic rack and wait...
steps.instruction: Place on magnetic rack and wait for the solution to clear, ~ 00:01:00

steps.title: Incubate at Room temperature for 00:02:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at Room temperature for 00:02:00

steps.title: Add 250 µL (1
steps.instruction: Add 250 µL (1.2X volume) AMPure XP beads and mix by pipetting up and down 10 times

steps.title: Centrifuge at ≥ 10000 rcf, Room...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at ≥ 10000 rcf, Room temperature, 2 minutes and transfer the supernatant to a new well-labeled tube. Take care not to transfer beads or cell debris.

steps.title: Repeat for a total of three bead beating cycles
steps.instruction: Repeat for a total of three bead beating cycles

steps.title: Bead beat the lysate at 6
steps.instruction: Bead beat the lysate at 6.5m/s for 00:00:45 with 00:01:00 rest between runs

steps.title: Transfer the inactivated bacterial suspension to...
steps.instruction: Transfer the inactivated bacterial suspension to a new well-labeled Starsted screw cap tube containing ~ 250 µL of Mini-BeadBeater Zirconia-Silicate Beads, -0.1 mm

steps.title: If required (i
steps.instruction: If required (i.e., to remove samples for processing outside a BSL-3), decontaminate the sample according to the standard operating procedures of your facility.

steps.title: Vortex sample and rpm, °C, 15 minutes, max speed
steps.instruction: Vortex sample and rpm, °C, 15 minutes, max speed

steps.title: Remove and discard the supernatant, and...
steps.instruction: Remove and discard the supernatant, and resuspend the pellet in 350 µL of Custom Triton Buffer

steps.title: Incubate at Room temperature for 00:15:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at Room temperature for 00:15:00

steps.title: Add four volumes of 100mM dithiothreitol...
steps.instruction: Add four volumes of 100mM dithiothreitol to the sputum sample and vortex for > 00:00:30

steps.title: If it is not possible to...
steps.instruction: If it is not possible to do the above in your laboratory. Use BBL MycoPrepTM (BD) reagent to process the sample according to the manufacturer's instructions with the following modification: Resuspend the sediment in step 8 in the protocol in 350 µL of Custom Triton Buffer

steps.title: Cut the bottom off a StarSted...
steps.instruction: Cut the bottom off a StarSted tube just below the inflection point. Cut the tip off a P1000 tip, cut a wedge near the end, and wedge the prepared StarSted tube in it.

steps.title: Fill a sterile container (e
steps.instruction: Fill a sterile container (e.g., a Petri dish) with -0.1 mm Zirconia-Silicate Beads and use the prepared scoop to distribute them into 1.5ml StarSted tubes.

steps.title: Add 200ul freshly prepared 70 %...
steps.instruction: Add 200ul freshly prepared 70 % (v/v) ethanol without disrupting the beads

steps.title: Repeat wash for a total of two washes Tip
steps.instruction: Repeat wash for a total of two washes Tip: Use a p20 to remove all the remaining EtOH

steps.title: Transfer the inactivated bacterial suspension to...
steps.instruction: Transfer the inactivated bacterial suspension to a new well-labeled Starsted screw cap tube containing ~ 250 µL of Mini-BeadBeater Zirconia-Silicate Beads, -0.1 mm

steps.title: Bead beat the lysate at 6
steps.instruction: Bead beat the lysate at 6.5m/s for 00:00:45 with 00:01:00 rest between runs

steps.title: Repeat for a total of three bead beating cycles
steps.instruction: Repeat for a total of three bead beating cycles

steps.title: Centrifuge at ≥ 10000 rcf, Room...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at ≥ 10000 rcf, Room temperature, 2 minutes and transfer the supernatant to a new well-labeled tube. Take care not to transfer beads or cell debris.

steps.title: Add 250 µL (1
steps.instruction: Add 250 µL (1.2X volume) AMPure XP beads and mix by pipetting up and down 10 times

steps.title: Incubate at Room temperature for 00:02:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at Room temperature for 00:02:00

steps.title: Place on magnetic rack and wait...
steps.instruction: Place on magnetic rack and wait for the solution to clear, ~ 00:01:00

steps.title: Add 200ul freshly prepared 70 %...
steps.instruction: Add 200ul freshly prepared 70 % (v/v) ethanol without disrupting the beads

steps.title: Repeat wash for a total of two washes Tip
steps.instruction: Repeat wash for a total of two washes Tip: Use a p20 to remove all the remaining EtOH

steps.title: Dry the beads briefly, ~ 00:01:00
steps.instruction: Dry the beads briefly, ~ 00:01:00 . Tip: Remove residual EtOH with a p10 pipette

steps.title: Immediately after the bead pellet becomes...
steps.instruction: Immediately after the bead pellet becomes opaque, remove the tube from the magnetic rack and resuspend in 20 µL of Low EDTA Tris Buffer . Ensure all beads are in solution.

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 00:02:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 00:02:00

steps.title: Place on the magnetic rack, wait...
steps.instruction: Place on the magnetic rack, wait for the solution to become clear ~ 00:00:30 , and transfer the eluted DNA to a new well-labeled tube
